underlying_goal: Implement Phase 0 of a frontend optimization plan for a desktop AI companion app (the-ai-U), including icon library integration, toast notifications, markdown rendering, ChatPage refactoring, and CSS design tokens
friction_detail: react-markdown v10 removed className prop and MicButton toast pattern caused test failures, requiring multiple fix iterations before all 455 tests passed.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to implement Phase 0 of a frontend optimization plan across 17 files (icons, toasts, markdown, hooks extraction, design tokens) and commit; Claude completed all tasks with passing tests after fixing two rounds of test failures.
